_comment: Fleet definition for `edge deploy`. Don't hand-edit this example — run `edge fleet` to generate fleet.json (gitignored) interactively, or copy this file to fleet.json and fill it in. Single source of truth for the deploy + the HAProxy backend list.
_order_note: Node ORDER is the routing priority: HAProxy `balance first` sends each request to the first-listed healthy node and overflows to later ones only when it's saturated or down. List your strongest/preferred node first.
_ssh_note: ssh values: 'user@host' (SSH+rsync), 'interop' (a Windows node managed via WSL->Windows interop when you deploy from that box), or '' (skip; set up manually).
_models_note: 'model' is the cluster default. A node may add an optional 'models' list; nodes without one serve the default. `edge model set <name> [--node X]` pulls + records these, and HAProxy routes each request to a node that actually has the requested model.
